_meta.description: TFA Vehicle Damage Profiles — zone x component weight matrix

artefact_filter.description: CAR impact > 150 km/h with |rel_Y| < 0.3 = teleport/spawn artefact, ignored

_calibration_notes.car_ref_100: A 100 km/h CAR impact (speed_eff=70) is catastrophic for a 60s GT car
_calibration_notes.env_ref_150: On fast circuits (Spa 66), 150 km/h wall impacts are the true disasters
_calibration_notes.susp_max_8: Suspension is robust (double wishbones steel) — max 8 kg reflects realistic handling penalty
_calibration_notes.dir_max_20: Direction reduced from 25 to 20 for balance — still dominant on frontal impacts
